scenarios.name: keyword_count_accuracy_10_turn
scenarios.description: Ten distinct prompts where each answer must stay correct while using a required word an exact number of times.
scenarios.system_prompt: You are a careful assistant. Answer each question directly and satisfy the exact word-count constraint without adding unrelated filler.

turns.user: What is 12 + 15? Answer in one sentence and use the lowercase word "note" exactly 2 times.
Policy: airport rideshare is reimbursable, minibar is never reimbursable. Is a $19 minibar charge reimbursable? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "clear" exactly 2 times.
Ticket SUP-7714 belongs to Mina Patel. Who owns the ticket? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "record" exactly 2 times.
The launch date is July 22. What is the launch date? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "date" exactly 3 times.
Which option is cheaper: Plan A at $39 or Plan B at $52? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "price" exactly 2 times.
Legal review is complete. Is legal review complete? Answer yes or no and use the lowercase word "legal" exactly 3 times.
BUG-431 is open and high severity. What is the strongest reason not to launch? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "risk" exactly 2 times.
Fallback date is August 5. If launch slips, what fallback date should we use? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "fallback" exactly 2 times.
Documentation is complete but support is not ready. Which item is not ready? Answer directly and use the lowercase word "status" exactly 2 times.
Should Atlas Relay launch on July 22 if BUG-431 is still open? Answer directly in exactly two sentences and use the lowercase word "confirm" exactly 3 times.

checks.name: final_answer_directly_says_no
checks.details: regex did not match: (?is)^\s*(no\b|not yet\b|do not launch|should not launch|delay)
